ग्रीष्म ऋतु के बाद वर्षा की पहली बूँद से प्रकृति में आए उल्लास और संवेदी बदलावों की कविता।
सुदर्शन द्वारा रचित कहानी; बाबा भारती और डाकू खड्गसिंह के माध्यम से मानवीय संवेदना व चारित्रिक बदलाव।
जीवन दर्शन और नैतिक मूल्यों को सिखाने वाले रहीम के अत्यंत प्रसिद्ध और प्रेरणाप्रद दोहे।
रामप्रसाद बिस्मिल की आत्मकथा; माँ के प्रति अगाध श्रद्धा, उनके उपकारों और प्रेरणा का सुंदर वर्णन।
अज्ञानता और हताशा के अंधकार को मिटाकर जीवन में आशा का संचार करने वाली प्रेरक कविता।
असम के पारंपरिक शास्त्रीय और लोक नृत्यों का परिचय कराता एक सांस्कृतिक निबंध।
सूरदास के प्रसिद्ध पद; श्रीकृष्ण की बाल-लीलाओं और निष्कपट बाल-मनोविज्ञान का अद्भुत ब्रज रस।
मुंशी प्रेमचंद की कालजयी कहानी; ऊपरी दिखावे के स्थान पर आत्मबल और परोपकार की सच्ची परख।
महाराणा प्रताप के पराक्रमी और स्वामिभक्त घोड़े चेतक की गति और युद्ध कौशल की वीर रस कविता।
रामधारी सिंह दिनकर का यात्रा वृतांत; मॉरीशस में बसे भारतीय समाज की जीवंत संस्कृति।
जगदीश चंद्र बोस के वैज्ञानिक तथ्यों पर आधारित निबंध; पौधों में संवेदनशीलता और जीवन का बोध।

English Grammar.description: Mastering Proper, Common, Abstract Nouns; singular/plural logic; pronoun classification and noun cases.
Structural usage of Simple and Continuous forms across Past, Present, and Future timelines.
Describing words, processing positive, comparative, superlative states, and modifiers of manner/time.
Spatial markers (in, out, under) and relational sentence coordinators (and, but, although, because).
Use of indefinite markers (a, an) based on phonetics, definite article (the), and baseline counters.
Restructuring randomized word tracks into logical sentences and spotting structural error omissions.
Layout constraints for formal school display notices, text alerts, and private diary summaries.
Drafting professional school leave requests alongside casual conversation letters for friends.
Expanding a point matrix into descriptive essay compositions or short morale tales.

Hindi Grammar.description: मौखिक-लिखित स्वरूप, देवनागरी लिपि के मानक नियम और शुद्ध लेखन के सिद्धांतों का व्यावहारिक ज्ञान।
स्वर-व्यंजन उच्चारण वर्गीकरण, संयुक्त अक्षरों की बनावट, और दो ध्वनियों के मेल से उत्पन्न होने वाली संधि।
तत्सम, तद्भव, देशज और विदेशी शब्दों का वर्गीकरण; पर्यायवाची, विलोम शब्द, और वाक्यांश के लिए एक शब्द।
संज्ञा के भेदों की पहचान; लिंग, वचन और कारक विभक्तियों (ने, को, से) के आधार पर संज्ञा रूपों में अनुकूलन।
सर्वनाम के प्रकार और संज्ञा-सर्वनाम की गुण-दोष सूचक विशेषताएँ बताने वाले विशेषण व उनकी अवस्थाएँ।
सकर्मक-अकर्मक क्रिया भेद, क्रिया के समय चक्र (भूत, वर्तमान, भविष्य), और कर्ता-कर्म आधारित वाच्य नियम।
मूल शब्दों के प्रारंभ में लगने वाले शब्दांश (उपसर्ग) तथा अंत में लगने वाले शब्दांश (प्रत्यय) से शब्द निर्माण।
लिंग, वचन या काल से अप्रभावित रहने वाले शब्द; जैसे क्रियाविशेषण, विस्मयादिबोधक, और समुच्चयबोधक।
उद्देश्य-विधेय की सही संरचना, और लेखन में ठहराव स्पष्ट करने के लिए पूर्णविराम, अल्पविराम, प्रश्नवाचक चिह्नों का प्रयोग।
भाषा को अधिक रोचक, तीक्ष्ण और अर्थपूर्ण बनाने हेतु विभिन्न लोकोक्तियों तथा मुहावरों का वाक्य प्रयोग।
औपचारिक (प्रधानाचार्य/प्रशासन को पत्र) व अनौपचारिक (मित्र/रिश्तेदारों को आमंत्रण) पत्रों का प्रारूप; तार्किक संवाद लेखन।
समसामयिक विषयों या वैचारिक संकेत बिंदुओं को ध्यान में रखकर क्रमबद्ध अर्थपूर्ण निबंध व अनुच्छेद की रचना।

Mathematics.description: Analyzing values extending to Lakhs, Crores, Millions, and Billions; comparing Indian vs International numeric notation structures.
Formulating order of operations, resolving nested brackets, and simplifying multi-tier numerical expressions systematically.
Decimal place-value expansions, rounding mechanics, arranging decimals sequentially, and baseline decimal addition/subtraction.
Transitioning into symbolic mathematical variables, isolating constants, algebraic expressions, and substituting variable values.
Investigating angles along a transversal intersection; corresponding, alternate interior, and vertically opposite angle rules.
Strengthening mental arithmetic via mathematical matrix grids, magic square puzzles, and checking advanced parity rules.

Mathematics.topic: A Tale of Three Intersecting Lines
Mathematics.description: Advanced triangle structures: angle sum properties, verifying exterior angles, medians, altitudes, and triangle inequality theorems.
Multi-step calculations involving fractional products, reciprocal division modeling, and resolving practical distribution problems.
Discovering Congruence across plane 2D geometric shapes, overlapping alignments, and testing specific criteria ($SSS, SAS, ASA, RHS$).
Advanced positive and negative integer arithmetic rules; executing integer multiplication and division with proper sign matrices.
Prime factorization techniques; calculating Highest Common Factor (HCF) and Lowest Common Multiple (LCM) properties.
Advanced decimal arithmetic algorithms: long multiplication and division methods, and shifting decimal points logically.
Finding central trends in data packets; computing the Arithmetic Mean, Median, and Mode from raw statistical samplings.
Creating angle bisectors, regular geometric shapes, tiling alignments, and tessellations using straightedges and compasses.
Formulating and balancing single-variable linear equations from word problems by performing inverse operations.

Science.description: Developing experimental methods, handling a baseline research statement, and tracking dependent vs independent variables.
Identifying pH levels using litmus, turmeric, and indicators; analyzing real-world neutralization reactions and salts.
Drawing schematic circuit maps, working with resistance elements, testing fuses, and verifying conductor vs insulator limits.

Science.topic: The World of Metals and Non-Metals
Science.description: Material science parameters: lustrous reflections, malleability, ductility, sonority, and studying elemental oxides via rusting.

Science.topic: Changes Around Us: Physical and Chemical
Science.description: Separating physical reversible states from irreversible chemical alterations; analyzing crystallization and galvanization.

Science.topic: Adolescence: A Stage of Growth and Change
Science.description: Growth shifts during teenage years; identifying endocrine hormones, maintaining mental/physical hygiene, and balanced nutrition.
Thermal energy flow dynamics: Conduction through solids, Convection currents (Sea/Land breezes), and solar Radiation wavelengths.
Kinematics equations where $Speed = Distance / Time$; analyzing simple pendulum oscillations and plotting distance-time graphs.
Exploring cellular ingestion networks, tracking human enzyme-driven digestion tracts, blood circulation, and waste filtration.
Plant physiology properties: leaf stomata behavior during Photosynthesis, root absorption loops, and xylem/phloem pathways.
Linear propagation tracks of light beams, ray reflection physics using plane and curved mirrors, and focal properties.
Planetary axes rotations, gravitational dependencies, predicting moon phase cycles, and tracing solar/lunar eclipses.

Social Science.description: Cartographic survey of physical features: the Himalayan barriers, river basins, the Deccan plateau, and coastal archipelagos.
Weather vs climate indices; tracing barometric pressure changes, relative humidity trends, and reading meteorological instruments.
Analyzing monsoonal mechanisms, variables impacting regional temperatures, jet streams, and observing local eco-shifts.
Historical urbanization from 600 BCE to 600 CE; charting Mahajanapadas expansion, administrative capitals, and class evolutions.
Evaluating the Mauryan empire structure, Chandragupta's state consolidation, tax systems, and Ashoka's Dhamma policies.
Post-Mauryan regional dynasties (Satavahanas, Chedis) and analyzing southern maritime trade links (Cholas, Cheras, Pandyas).

Social Science.topic: The Gupta Era: An Age of Tireless Creativity
Social Science.description: The classical era of knowledge; scientific developments by Aryabhata, temple art, and reviewing travel accounts.
Cultural pathways; investigating how regional landscapes and geography gave rise to sacred pilgrimage sites and temples.

Social Science.topic: From Pilgrimage to Trades, Beyond India
Social Science.description: Tracing ancient trans-border trade highways, merchant guilds, maritime navigation layouts, and cross-border cultural sharing.

Social Science.topic: From the Rulers to Ruled: Types of Govts
Social Science.description: Comparative governance models: Absolute Monarchies, Dictatorial setups, Oligarchies, and Citizen-led Democracies.
Formative study of the 1946 Constituent Assembly, drafting goals, fundamental principles in the Preamble, and Secularism.
Trade history loops: transitioning from matching merchandise swaps to metal mint coins, paper currency, and modern digital bank apps.
Wholesale vs retail distribution lines, understanding pricing margins, and evaluating local markets and weekly bazaars.

English Literature.description: Literary prose analysis highlighting collaborative student experiences, empathy scripts, and parsing basic action phrases.
Humorous narratives and poems focused on analyzing comedic timing, word puns, character actions, and situational ironies.
Expository texts detailing unique personal achievements, scientific inquiries, and biographical narratives of famous innovators.
Travelogue formats exploring survival strategies across physical terrains, expanding geographical adjectives, and settings analysis.
Inspiring accounts of real-life heroism, resilience modules, patriotic values, and analyzing character profiles.

Hindi Literature.description: मैथिलीशरण गुप्त की प्रसिद्ध कविता; यशोधरा और राहुल के माध्यम से करुणा, जीव-दया और अहिंसा के नैतिक मूल्यों का रसास्वादन।
बुद्धि-चातुर्य, विवेकपूर्ण निर्णय क्षमता और सूझबूझ को बढ़ावा देने वाली अत्यंत मनोरंजक पारंपरिक लोककथा।
अयोध्यासिंह उपाध्याय 'हरिऔध' की रचना; समान परिवेश में जनमकर भी स्वभाव भिन्नता के आधार पर चारित्रिक श्रेष्ठता की सीख।
अनुपम मिश्र के विचारों से प्रेरित गद्य; जल चक्र, जल संरक्षण की अनिवार्यता और भूजल संकट के प्रति सामाजिक चेतना।
स्वास्थ्य, व्यक्तिगत स्वच्छता, संतुलित आहार और निरोगी जीवन जीने के व्यावहारिक नियमों पर आधारित निबंध।
लोक व्यवहार, व्यावहारिक ज्ञान, नीतिपरक बातें और समाज में गरिमापूर्ण जीवन जीने की कला सिखाती कुंडलियाँ।
मुकुटधर पांडेय की प्रकृतिपरक कविता; सावन मास में प्रकृति में आने वाले जादुई बदलावों और उल्लास का काव्यात्मक गान।
कथक सम्राट पंडित बिरजू महाराज के जीवन संघर्ष, कला के प्रति समर्पण और कलात्मक यात्रा को दर्शाता प्रेरक साक्षात्कार।
महादेवी वर्मा या अन्य श्रेष्ठ रचनाकारों के दृष्टिकोण से आज़ादी के महत्त्व, और जीव-जंतुओं के प्रति प्रेम का संवेदी चित्रण।
मध्यकालीन कृष्ण-भक्ति काव्य परंपरा; मीराबाई के पदों में छिपी अनन्य भक्ति, समर्पण और ब्रज-राजस्थानी मिश्रित भाषा शैली।

English Grammar.description: Mastering structural differences between Past and Present Perfect tenses; continuous progression alignments across compound lines.
Mechanics for shifting active statements to standard passive structures, keeping agent rules uniform.
Converting direct statement quotes into indirect reported narratives with proper tense modifications.
Using helping verbs (can, could, should, must, would, may) to express capability, obligations, or permissions.
Using relative pronouns (who, which, whose, that) to bind dependent details onto independent main clauses.
Drafting announcements inside structured borders for school event notices or public information displays.
Styling professional emails with clear, precise subject fields alongside formal applications or letters to editors.
Writing data-driven essays based on chart inputs, tables, or visual evidence models.

Hindi Grammar.description: कंठ्य, तालव्य, मूर्धन्य ध्वनियों का वर्गीकरण; अनुस्वार, अनुनासिक और नुक्ता युक्त बाहरी आगत ध्वनियों का भाषाई शुद्धिकरण।
दो निकटवर्ती ध्वनियों के मेल का नियम; दीर्घ, गुण, वृद्धि और यण संधि के नियमों का सटीक विच्छेद अभ्यास।
मूल शब्दों के प्रारंभ में जुड़ने वाले उपसर्ग और अंत में लगने वाले प्रत्यय के योग से नए अर्थपूर्ण शब्दों का निर्माण।
संज्ञा व सर्वनाम का क्रिया से संबंध जोड़ने वाले आठों कारकों (कर्ता से संबोधन तक) के चिह्नों का सटीक वाक्य प्रयोग।
दो या दो से अधिक शब्दों को मिलाकर संक्षिप्त शब्द बनाने की प्रक्रिया; द्वंद्व, द्विगु, और तत्पुरुष समास की पहचान।
वाक्य संरचनागत अशुद्धियों; जैसे लिंग-वचन असंतुलन, अनुपयुक्त शब्द प्रयोग, और क्रिया दोषों को सुधारने का कौशल।
उच्च स्तरीय पर्यायवाची, विलोम शब्द, श्रुतिसमभिन्नार्थक शब्द, अनेकार्थी शब्द, और मुहावरों/लोकोक्तियों का सटीक वाक्य प्रयोग।
प्रधानाचार्य को आवेदन, स्थानीय प्रशासन को शिकायती पत्र, तथा स्वजनों को आमंत्रण व बधाई पत्रों के अद्यतन प्रारूप।
संकेत बिंदुओं के आधार पर समसामयिक विषयों पर तार्किक निबंध लेखन; और दो चरित्रों के बीच सुगठित व यथार्थवादी संवाद लेखन।

Mathematics.description: Perfect squares, square roots, perfect cubes, and cube roots; tracking visual patterns and estimating roots.
Advanced exponent rules, laws of exponents, and short computational ways to read or write extremely large numbers without ambiguity.
The evolution of numbers; mapping natural numbers, whole numbers, integers, and rational numbers systematically on number lines.
Properties of four-sided figures; classifying regular/irregular quadrilaterals, interior angle sums, and diagonal intersections.
Advanced divisibility rules, prime factorization matrices, solving complex HCF/LCM puzzles, and cryptarithms.
Introduction to advanced algebraic expressions, multi-tier polynomial multiplication, and working with the distributive law.
Ratio and proportion operations, equivalent ratios, direct and inverse variation trends, and percentage applications in daily trade.

Science.topic: Exploring the Investigative World of Science
Science.description: Principles of scientific methods; designing experiments, building hypotheses, and establishing data collection protocols.

Science.topic: The Invisible Living World: Beyond Our Naked Eye
Science.description: Microscopic ecosystems; analyzing animal and plant cell structures, cell walls, membranes, the nucleus, and cellular functions.
The human immune system; tracking how microorganisms trigger infections, and studying the science of nutrition, antibiotics, and vaccines.
Applied electronics; analyzing the heating and magnetic effects of electric current, electromagnetic loops, and electrical motors.
Mechanics parameters; understanding vector balances, acceleration trends, friction variables, and calculating net force operations.
Atmospheric force metrics; how air pressure discrepancies cause wind formation, storms, thunder, and cyclical weather changes.

Science.topic: Nature of Matter: Elements, Compounds, & Mixtures
Science.description: Classifying pure substances vs uniform/non-uniform mixtures; tracking atomic arrangements and chemical separation formulas.
Ray optics; tracing laws of reflection across flat and curved mirrors, bending light through lenses, and the anatomy of the human eye.
Exploring outer space; analyzing planetary configurations, constellations, the lifecycle of stars, and lunar path schedules.

Social Science.description: Earth's primary assets; distribution maps of water, forests, and mineral wealth, and tracking sustainable conservation lines.
Tracing political realignments from the 11th to 17th century; the Delhi Sultanate, regional dynasties, and medieval economic adaptations.
Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj's administrative networks, fort architectures, naval defense mechanisms, and inspiring cultural revivals.
Analyzing British administrative distortions, deindustrialization mechanisms, widespread famines, and early Indian resistance.
Democratic voting right frameworks; the role of the Election Commission of India, managing free/fair ballots, and voter participation.
Functionality of Parliament; separating lawmakers from executive branches, and analyzing democratic checks and balances.
Understanding land, labor, capital, and entrepreneurship; how technology and healthcare training expand global human productivity.

English Literature.description: Analyzing classic fables; tracking deep allegorical meanings, character flaws, and advanced plot pacing.
Narrative prose focusing on multi-generational family dynamics, breaking social isolation, and empathy modules.
Informational prose mapping the history of automation, digital responsibility, and real-world ethical technology usage.
Travel logs and modern literature emphasizing international unities, cross-border migrations, and shared world heritages.
Historical biographical texts honoring freedom fighters, armed forces achievements, and community leadership paths.

Hindi Literature.description: प्रसिद्ध कवियों द्वारा रचित राष्ट्रप्रेम और सांस्कृतिक गौरव से ओत-प्रोत उच्च स्तरीय कविताओं का आलोचनात्मक अध्ययन।
मुंशी प्रेमचंद या अन्य वैचारिक निबंधकारों के गद्य; चरित्र निर्माण, स्वावलंबन, और दृढ़ इच्छाशक्ति के महत्व का बोध।
कबीरदास के कालजयी दोहे; सामाजिक कुरीतियों पर प्रहार, बाह्याडंबरों का विरोध, और व्यावहारिक नीतिपरक जीवन मूल्यों की सीख।
नरोत्तमदास का प्रसिद्ध सवैया; कृष्ण-सुदामा की निश्छल और ऐतिहासिक मित्रता, करुणा रस, और ब्रजभाषा की काव्य शैली का रसास्वादन।
बदलते वैश्विक परिदृश्य, तकनीकी विकास, और मानवीय मूल्यों पर उसके प्रभावों का विश्लेषण करता आधुनिक ज्ञानवर्धक निबंध।
स्वतंत्रता संग्राम की प्रख्यात कवयित्री सुभद्रा कुमारी चौहान की जीवन-गाथा, वीर रस रचनाएँ, और राष्ट्रीय चेतना का बोध।
भारत के विभिन्न राज्यों की पारंपरिक लोक कलाओं (जैसे मधुबनी, वारली), हस्तशिल्प और सांस्कृतिक धरोहर पर आधारित कलात्मक निबंध।
भारत के महान गणितज्ञ श्रीनिवास रामानुजन की जीवनी; उनकी अद्भुत संख्या-साधना, संघर्ष, और वैश्विक स्तर पर उनके गणितीय योगदान।

English Grammar.description: Mastering transitions across Past, Present, and Future Perfect Continuous tenses; handling condition clauses safely ($If / Unless$).
Interchanging complex declarative, imperative, and interrogative sentences between Active/Passive and Direct/Indirect speech formats.
Differentiating the structural syntax and behavior of Gerunds ($Verb+ing$ as noun), Infinitives ($To+Verb$), and Participles.
Merging multiple single sentences into Compound and Complex structures using subordinate, relative, and noun clauses.
Demystifying context-dependent phrasal verbs, standard prepositional collocations, and formatting precise figurative text lines.
Strict formatting blueprints for drafting institutional public notices, statutory warnings, and agenda minutes for display boards.
Writing formal letters to public municipal editors, letters of complaint to corporate spaces, and professional email layouts.
Compiling structured argument essays, data-driven analytical reviews based on chart layouts, and presenting summary reports.

Hindi Grammar.description: स्वर और व्यंजन ध्वनियों का गहन वर्गीकरण; विसर्ग, व्यंजन, और स्वर संधि के जटिल विच्छेद नियमों का शुद्ध व्याकरणिक अभ्यास।
तत्सम-तद्भव के उन्नत प्रयोग; संकर शब्द (दो भाषाओं के मेल), यौगिक, और योगरूढ़ शब्दों की पहचान; नए उपसर्ग-प्रत्यय नियम।
वाक्य में आए प्रत्येक शब्द (पद) का व्याकरणिक परिचय देना; संज्ञा, सर्वनाम, विशेषण, क्रिया की कारक विभक्तियों के साथ संगति।
समस्त पदों का विग्रह करने की वैज्ञानिक पद्धति; अव्ययीभाव, तत्पुरुष, कर्मधारय, द्विगु, द्वंद्व और बहुव्रीहि समास का विस्तृत विश्लेषण।
काव्य सौंदर्य को बढ़ाने वाले प्रमुख शब्दालंकार (अनुप्रास, यमक) व अर्थालंकार (उपमा, रूपक, अतिशयोक्ति) के लक्षण; बुनियादी रसों का परिचय।
रचना के आधार पर वाक्य भेद (सरल, संयुक्त, मिश्र); अर्थ के आधार पर भेद, और वाक्यगत वर्तनी व व्याकरणिक अशुद्धियों का शोधन।
प्रशासनिक एवं व्यावहारिक पर्यायवाची, विलोम शब्द, अनेक शब्दों के लिए एक शब्द, श्रुतिसमभिन्नार्थक शब्द, और मुहावरों का सटीक प्रयोग।
औपचारिक पत्र प्रारूप (संपादक को पत्र, शिकायती पत्र, व्यावसायिक ऑर्डर); अनौपचारिक पत्रों का विशिष्ट आमंत्रण प्रारूप।
ज्वलंत सामाजिक, वैज्ञानिक व आर्थिक विषयों पर रूपरेखा सहित विस्तृत निबंध रचना; दो बुद्धजीवियों के मध्य गंभीर विषयों पर संवाद लेखन।

Mathematics.description: Irrational numbers, real numbers and their decimal expansions, representing real numbers on the number line, operations on real numbers, and laws of exponents for real numbers.
Polynomials in one variable, zeroes of a polynomial, Remainder Theorem, Factor Theorem, factorization of polynomials, and algebraic identities.
Cartesian system, coordinate planes, finding and plotting points in a plane, quadrant rules, and x/y-axis notations.
Introduction to linear equations ($ax + by + c = 0$), finding solutions of a linear equation, and graphing linear equations in two variables.
Euclid's definitions, axioms, and postulates; checking the equivalent versions of Euclid's fifth postulate.
Basic terms, intersecting and non-intersecting lines, pairs of angles, parallel lines and a transversal, and angle sum property of triangles.
Congruence of triangles, criteria for congruence ($SAS, ASA, SSS, RHS$), properties of triangles, and inequalities in a triangle.
Properties of a parallelogram, conditions for a quadrilateral to be a parallelogram, and the Mid-point Theorem.
Angle subtended by a chord at a point, perpendicular from the center to a chord, equal chords and their distances, angles subtended by an arc, and cyclic quadrilaterals.
Calculating the area of a triangle using Heron's Formula ($s = \frac{a+b+c}{2}$ and $\text{Area} = \sqrt{s(s-a)(s-b)(s-c)}$) and its application in finding areas of quadrilaterals.
Surface area and volume of a right circular cylinder, right circular cone, and sphere/hemisphere.
Collection and presentation of data, graphical representation of data (bar graphs, histograms, frequency polygons), and measures of central tendency.

Science.description: Physical nature of matter, characteristics of particles, states of matter (solid, liquid, gas), effect of temperature and pressure on state changes, sublimation, and evaporation.
Elements, compounds, and mixtures; homogeneous vs heterogeneous mixtures; true solutions, suspensions, colloids; and separation techniques.
Laws of chemical combination, Dalton's atomic theory, atomic and molecular mass, writing chemical formulas, and the mole concept.
Charged particles in matter, Thomson's, Rutherford's, and Bohr's models of an atom; electron distribution (Bohr-Bury scheme), valency, atomic number, mass number, isotopes, and isobars.
Cell as a basic unit of life; prokaryotic and eukaryotic cells; plasma membrane, cell wall, nucleus; cell organelles (mitochondria, plastids, ER, Golgi apparatus, lysosomes, vacuoles).
Structure and functions of plant tissues (meristematic and permanent tissues) and animal tissues (epithelial, connective, muscular, and nervous tissues).
Distance and displacement, scalar/vector quantities, uniform/non-uniform motion, velocity, acceleration, uniform circular motion, and graphical equations of motion.
Balanced and unbalanced forces, Newton's First Law of Motion (inertia and mass), Newton's Second Law ($F=ma$), momentum, and Newton's Third Law.
Universal Law of Gravitation, acceleration due to gravity ($g$), mass vs weight, free fall, thrust and pressure, Archimedes' Principle, and buoyancy.
Scientific concept of work, kinetic and potential energy, Law of Conservation of Energy, and rate of doing work (power).
Production and propagation of sound, wave nature of sound (frequency, amplitude, speed), speed of sound in mediums, reflection of sound, echo, SONAR, and the human ear.
Crop yield improvement, crop variety management, crop production management, nutrient management, manure, fertilizers, storage of grains, animal husbandry (cattle, poultry, fish, bee-keeping).

History.description: The Old Regime crisis, the outbreak of the revolution, the constitutional monarchy, the Reign of Terror, the rise of Napoleon, and the global legacy of liberty.
The age of social change, liberals, radicals, and conservatives; the industrial society, the February Revolution in Petrograd, the October Revolution, and the creation of a Soviet state.

History.topic: Nazism and the Rise of Hitler
History.description: The Weimar Republic crisis, Hitler's rise to power, the Nazi ideology, the racial state, youth and women in Nazi Germany, and the Holocaust.
Deforestation trends under colonial rule, commercial forestry, rebellion in the forests (Bastar, Java), and the impact of timber trade on tribal communities.
Pastoral nomads and their movements in mountains, plains, plateaus, and deserts; the impact of colonial laws on pastoral life, and how they coped with modern changes.

Geography.description: India's geographical location in the world, its size, the Standard Meridian, its strategic position on trade routes, and its neighboring countries.
Major physiographic divisions: The Himalayan Mountains, Northern Plains, Peninsular Plateau, Indian Desert, Coastal Plains, and Islands.
Major river systems of India (Himalayan rivers vs Peninsular rivers), lakes, the economic role of rivers, and controlling river pollution.
Factors affecting India's climate (latitude, altitude, pressure, and winds), the Indian Monsoon mechanism, seasons, and distribution of rainfall.
Factors affecting flora and fauna, vegetation types (Tropical Evergreen, Deciduous, Thorn, Montane, Mangrove), and wildlife conservation.
Population size and distribution, population growth and processes of change (birth rate, death rate, migration), age composition, sex ratio, literacy, and National Population Policy.

Political Science.description: Defining democracy, its core features, arguments for and against democracy, and the broader meaning of a democratic society.
Democratic constitution in South Africa (Apartheid struggle), why we need a constitution, the making of the Indian Constitution, and its guiding values.
Why elections are necessary, what makes an election democratic, India's system of elections (constituencies, voter lists, nomination, campaigns, and the Election Commission).
How major policy decisions are taken; the Parliament (Lok Sabha, Rajya Sabha), Political Executive (PM, Cabinet, President), and the Judiciary.
Life without rights (Guantanamo Bay, Saudi Arabia), rights in a democracy, rights in the Indian Constitution (Fundamental Rights), and expanding the scope of rights.

Economics.description: Human capital formation; economic activities by men and women; quality of population (education, health), and the challenge of unemployment.
Poverty lines, estimates, vulnerable groups, interstate disparities, global poverty scenarios, causes of poverty, and anti-poverty measures.
Dimensions of food security, food production trends, buffer stocks, Public Distribution System (PDS), fair price shops, and the role of cooperatives.

English Literature.description: Extracting core themes from texts like The Fun They Had, My Childhood, A Truly Beautiful Mind, Kathmandu, and If I Were You; character sketching, and vocabulary expansion.
Literary devices, rhyme schemes, and central ideas of poems including The Road Not Taken, Wind, Rain on the Roof, No Men Are Foreign, and On Killing a Tree.
Analytical reading of supplementary fiction like The Lost Child, The Adventures of Toto, The Happy Prince, The Last Leaf, and The Beggar; evaluating narrative styles and underlying morals.

Hindi Literature.topic: गद्य खंड (दो बैलों की कथा, ल्हासा की ओर, उपभोक्तावाद की संस्कृति, सांवले सपनों की याद, प्रेमचंद के फटे जूते आदि)
Hindi Literature.description: प्रेमचंद, राहुल सांकृत्यायन व अन्य लेखकों की रचनाओं का आलोचनात्मक अध्ययन; सामाजिक कुरीतियों, व्यंग्य विधा, और गद्य की भाषाई शैली का विश्लेषण।

Hindi Literature.topic: काव्य खंड (कबीर की साखियाँ एवं सबद, वाख, सवैये, कैदी और कोकिला, बच्चे काम पर जा रहे हैं आदि)
Hindi Literature.description: कबीर, ललद्यद, रसखान, और माखनलाल चतुर्वेदी के काव्यों का पठन; भक्ति काल, राष्ट्रीय चेतना, और अलंकारों का काव्यात्मक सौंदर्य बोध।

Hindi Literature.topic: पूरक पाठ्यपुस्तक (इस जल प्रलय में, मेरे संग की औरतें, रीढ़ की हड्डी)
Hindi Literature.description: आंचलिक विधा, संस्मरण, और सामाजिक-पारिवारिक ताने-बाने पर आधारित एकांकी का अध्ययन; चरित्र चित्रण और सामाजिक समस्याओं का बोध।

English Grammar.description: Master functional use of all 12 tense structures in context; applying modal auxiliaries (can, could, should, must, might) for permissions and obligations.
Verifying numerical and grammatical alignment between complex subjects and verbs; handling collective, indefinite, and compound subject rules.
Transforming direct conversation lines into indirect text segments; handling statements, imperatives, questions, commands, and requests.
Practical error correction, inserting correct prepositions/conjunctions, cloze tests, and re-arranging jumbled phrases into coherent syntax.
Structuring a 100-120 word analytical paragraph detailing a specific Person, Object, Event, or keeping a detailed personal Diary Entry.
Formulating original short stories from a given visual or verbal prompt cue, organizing progressive plots, dialogues, and a final moral summary.

Hindi Grammar.description: मूल शब्दों के प्रारंभ में जुड़ने वाले शब्दांश (उपसर्ग) और अंत में जुड़ने वाले शब्दांश (प्रत्यय) के माध्यम से नए शब्द बनाना और उनके अर्थ परिवर्तन को समझना।
दो या दो से अधिक शब्दों के संक्षिप्तीकरण की प्रक्रिया; तत्पुरुष, कर्मधारय, द्विगु, द्वंद्व, अव्ययीभाव और बहुव्रीहि समास का विस्तृत अध्ययन व विग्रह।

Hindi Grammar.topic: अर्थ के आधार पर वाक्य भेद
Hindi Grammar.description: वाक्य के अर्थगत स्वरूप की पहचान और परस्पर रूपांतरण; विधानवाचक, निषेधवाचक, प्रश्नवाचक, विस्मयादिवाचक, आज्ञावाचक, इच्छावाचक, संदेहवाचक और संकेतवाचक वाक्य।
काव्य की सुंदरता बढ़ाने वाले तत्वों का अध्ययन; शब्दालंकार (अनुप्रास, यमक, श्लेष) और अर्थालंकार (उपमा, रूपक, उत्प्रेक्षा, अतिशयोक्ति, मानवीकरण) के लक्षण व उदाहरण।
अनजाने गद्य और पद्य खंडों को पढ़कर केंद्रीय भाव समझना, महत्वपूर्ण शीर्षकों का चुनाव करना, और पूछे गए विश्लेषणात्मक प्रश्नों के उत्तर सटीक रूप में लिखना।
दिए गए समसामयिक, व्यावहारिक या वैचारिक संकेत बिंदुओं (Hints) के आधार पर तार्किक और क्रमबद्ध रूप से लगभग 120 शब्दों में सुगठित अनुच्छेद तैयार करना।
प्रशासनिक, व्यवसायिक, शिकायती अथवा प्रधानाचार्य को लिखे जाने वाले औपचारिक पत्र; तथा सगे-संबंधियों व मित्रों को लिखे जाने वाले अनौपचारिक पत्रों का अद्यतन प्रारूप।
दो व्यक्तियों के बीच किसी विषय पर यथार्थवादी, रोचक और सुगठित संवाद (Dialogue) लिखना; अथवा दी गई रूपरेखा के आधार पर शिक्षाप्रद लघु कथा बुनना।
आधुनिक डिजिटल माध्यम के अनुसार औपचारिक ईमेल (E-mail) का प्रारूप तैयार करना; तथा विद्यालय या सार्वजनिक सूचना पट्ट हेतु औपचारिक सूचना (Notice) लेखन का अभ्यास।

Mathematics.description: Fundamental Theorem of Arithmetic; statements after reviewing work done earlier, illustrating and motivating through examples, and proofs of irrationality of $\sqrt{2}, \sqrt{3}, \sqrt{5}$.
Zeroes of a polynomial; finding the relationship between zeroes and coefficients of quadratic polynomials.

Mathematics.topic: Pair of Linear Equations in Two Variables
Mathematics.description: Pair of linear equations in two variables and graphical method of their solution, consistency/inconsistency; algebraic conditions for number of solutions. Solution by substitution and elimination.

Standard form of a quadratic equation $ax^2 + bx + c = 0$, $(a \neq 0)$. Solutions of quadratic equations (only real roots) by factorization and by using the quadratic formula; relationship between discriminant and nature of roots.
Motivation for studying Arithmetic Progression, derivation of the $n$-th term and sum of the first $n$ terms of A.P. and their application in solving daily life problems.
Definitions, examples, and counterexamples of similar triangles. Proofs and applications of the Basic Proportionality Theorem and criteria for similarity of triangles ($AAA, SAS, SSS$).
Review of concepts of coordinate geometry, graphs of linear equations; calculating lengths using the Distance formula and Section formula (internal division).

Trigonometric ratios of an acute angle of a right-angled triangle. Values of the trigonometric ratios of $0^\circ, 30^\circ, 45^\circ, 60^\circ, 90^\circ$; relationships between the ratios and proving the identity $\sin^2 A + \cos^2 A = 1$.

Heights and Distances: Angle of elevation, Angle of depression. Simple problems on heights and distances involving not more than two right triangles where angles are restricted to $30^\circ, 45^\circ, 60^\circ$.

Tangents to a circle at a point of contact. Proving that the tangent is perpendicular to the radius through the point of contact, and that lengths of tangents drawn from an external point to a circle are equal.
Area of sectors and segments of a circle. Problems based on areas and perimeter/circumference of circles, restricting central angles to $60^\circ, 90^\circ, 120^\circ$.
Surface areas and volumes of combinations of any two of the following: cubes, cuboids, spheres, hemispheres, and right circular cylinders/cones.
Calculating the Mean, Median, and Mode of grouped data arrays. Finding Mean using the Direct method and the Assumed Mean method.
Classical definition of probability; resolving simple situational problems on finding the probability of an event.

Science.description: Chemical equations, balancing equations, and implications. Types of chemical reactions: combination, decomposition, displacement, double displacement, precipitation, endothermic/exothermic reactions, oxidation, and reduction.

General chemical properties, examples, and uses. Concept of the pH scale ($0-14$) and its importance in everyday life; preparation and uses of Sodium Hydroxide, Bleaching powder, Baking soda, Washing soda, and Plaster of Paris.
Physical and chemical properties of metals and non-metals; reactivity series. Formation and properties of ionic compounds, basic metallurgical processes, corrosion, and its prevention.

Covalent bonding in carbon compounds; versatile nature of carbon and homologous series. Nomenclature of carbon compounds containing functional groups, saturated vs unsaturated hydrocarbons, chemical properties, and soaps/detergents.
Basic concepts of nutrition, respiration, transport, and excretion in plants and animals necessary to sustain life.
Tropic movements in plants; introduction of plant hormones. Control and coordination in animals: nervous system, voluntary, involuntary, reflex action, and animal hormones.
Modes of reproduction in animals and plants (asexual and sexual). Reproductive health: family planning methods, safe sex protocols, childbearing, and women's health parameters.
Core principles of heredity; Mendel's contribution and laws for the inheritance of traits, alongside sex determination tracking.

Reflection of light by curved surfaces; images formed by spherical mirrors, center of curvature, mirror formula, and magnification. Laws of refraction, refractive index, lens formula, and power of a lens.

Science.topic: The Human Eye and the Colourful World
Science.description: Refraction of light through a prism, dispersion of light, scattering of light, and natural phenomena. Vision defects (Myopia, Hypermetropia, Presbyopia) and their structural corrections.

Electric current, potential difference, Ohm's law, resistance, and resistivity. Series and parallel combinations of resistors and practical applications; heating effects of electric current and electric power interrelations.

Magnetic fields, field lines, and fields due to current-carrying straight conductors, loops, and solenoids. Force on current-carrying conductors, Fleming's Left-Hand Rule, electric motors, electromagnetic induction, and Fleming's Right-Hand Rule.
Ecosystem components, food chains, and webs; analyzing environmental issues including ozone layer depletion, waste production, and biodegradable vs non-biodegradable solutions.

History.topic: The Rise of Nationalism in Europe
History.description: The French Revolution and the idea of the nation; the making of nationalism in Europe, revolutions (1830-1848), unification of Germany/Italy, and Imperialism.
The First World War, Khilafat, and Non-Cooperation movements; differing strands within movements, civil disobedience phases, and the sense of collective belonging.

History.topic: The Making of a Global World
History.description: Pre-modern world to Conquest, Disease, and Trade evaluated in boards. The remaining subtopics (19th-century economy to Bretton Woods) are assessed through projects.
The pre-industrial era, the coming up of factories, industrial growth patterns, and the market for goods (evaluated through periodic/internal metrics).

History.topic: Print Culture and the Modern World
History.description: The first printed books, expansion of print into Europe, print revolution impact, public debates, India and print development, and histories of censorship.

Geography.description: Types and development of resources, resource planning in India, land resources, land degradation, soil classification, soil erosion, and conservation.
Biodiversity profiles, conservation of forest and wildlife networks in India, categories and distribution of forests, and community conservation.
Water scarcity indices, multi-purpose river valley projects, integrated water resource management, and rainwater harvesting models.
Types of farming, cropping patterns, major crops across states, technological and institutional agricultural reforms, and food security.
Occurrences of minerals, ferrous/non-ferrous classifications, non-metallic minerals, conservation lines, and conventional vs non-conventional energy resources.
Importance of manufacturing, industrial localization parameters, agro-based vs mineral-based industries, industrial pollution, and environmental mitigation.
Evaluated exclusively for map pointing board parameters covering major seaports, international airports, and geographic transit lines.

Political Science.description: Case studies of Belgium and Sri Lanka; analyzing why power sharing is desirable and detailing operational forms of power sharing.
Defining federalism, structural elements making India a federal nation, how federalism is practiced, and decentralization models (Panchayats/Municipalities).
Gender and politics (women's representation), religion, communalism and politics (secular state setups), and the dual dynamics of caste in politics.
Purpose, meaning, and functions of political parties; national vs state parties, challenges to political parties, and structural party reforms.
Assessing democracy: accountable, responsive, and legitimate governance; economic growth, reduction of inequality, accommodation of diversity, and individual freedom.

Economics.description: Developmental goals and variations, national income indicators, comparing countries/states via Per Capita Income, public utilities, and sustainability metrics.
Categorizing Primary, Secondary, and Tertiary sectors in India; historical sector shifts, Organized vs Unorganized labor divisions, and Public vs Private ownership.
Money as a medium of exchange, modern currency formats, banking operations, terms of credit, formal vs informal sector credit lines, and Self-Help Groups (SHGs).
Interlinking production across borders, multinational corporations (MNCs), foreign trade controls, defining globalization drivers, WTO, and fair globalization struggles.
Handled through project portfolios targeting market exploitation cases, consumer awareness movements, and the consumer court system (COPRA).

English Literature.description: Comprehensive text reading: A Letter to God, Nelson Mandela, Two Stories about Flying, Diary of Anne Frank, Glimpses of India, Mijbil the Otter, Madam Rides the Bus, Sermon at Benares, The Proposal.
Structural and thematic analysis of poems: Dust of Snow, Fire and Ice, Tiger in the Zoo, How to Tell Wild Animals, The Ball Poem, Amanda!, Custard the Dragon, For Anne Gregory.

Evaluating narrative styles: A Triumph of Surgery, The Thief's Story, The Midnight Visitor, A Question of Trust, Footprints without Feet, Making of a Scientist, The Necklace, Bholi, The Book That Saved the Earth.

Hindi Literature.topic: गद्य खंड (नेताजी का चश्मा, बालगोबिन भगत, लखनवी अंदाज़, एक कहानी यह भी, नौबतखाने में इबादत, संस्कृति)
Hindi Literature.description: प्रसिद्ध कहानीकारों के गद्य खंड का सघन अध्ययन; व्यंग्य विधा, चरित्र चित्रण, मानवीय मूल्यों और संस्कृति का भाषाई विश्लेषण।

Hindi Literature.topic: काव्य खंड (सूरदास के पद, तुलसीदास का राम-लक्ष्मण-परशुराम संवाद, आत्मकथ्य, उत्साह-अट नहीं रही है, यह दंतुरित मुस्कान-फसल, संगतकार)
Hindi Literature.description: सूरदास, तुलसीदास, जयशंकर प्रसाद, और निराला की रचनाओं का पठन; ब्रज व अवधि भाषा शैली, छंद योजना, रस और अलंकारों का काव्यात्मक सौंदर्य बोध।

Hindi Literature.topic: पूरक पाठ्यपुस्तक (माता का अंचल, साना-साना हाथ जोड़ि, मैं क्यों लिखता हूँ)
Hindi Literature.description: आंचलिक परिवेश, यात्रा वृतांत और आत्मचिंतन परक गद्य विधाओं का विस्तृत अध्ययन; देशज शब्दों का प्रयोग और सामाजिक-सांस्कृतिक चेतना।

English Grammar.description: Mastering all 12 structural tense timelines within text sequences; correct contextual placement of definite and indefinite determiners.
Applying modal auxiliaries (can, could, should, must, may) based on context; enforcing rigorous Subject-Verb Agreement alignments.
Transforming conversation exchanges to indirect reporting formatting, focusing on Commands, Requests, Statements, and Questions.
Contextual error detection, editing structural slips, identifying missing parts of speech, and sentence transformation arrays.
Structuring 100-120 word official formal letters: Letters of Complaint (Business/Civic), Letters of Inquiry, Placing Orders, or Letters to Editors.
Composing evidence-based analytical prose text paragraphs interpreting data from line graphs, pie charts, maps, or prompt matrices.

Hindi Grammar.topic: रचना के आधार पर वाक्य भेद
Hindi Grammar.description: वाक्यों की संरचना और पारस्परिक रूपांतरण; सरल वाक्य, संयुक्त वाक्य और मिश्र वाक्यों की पहचान व उपवाक्य भेद (संज्ञा, विशेषण, क्रियाविशेषण)।
क्रिया के प्रयोग रूप का परिचय; कर्तृवाच्य, कर्मवाच्य और भाववाच्य की पहचान तथा एक वाच्य से दूसरे वाच्य में व्याकरणिक परिवर्तन का अभ्यास।
वाक्य में प्रयुक्त प्रत्येक पद का पूर्ण व्याकरणिक परिचय देना; संज्ञा, सर्वनाम, विशेषण, क्रिया, अव्यय के भेद, लिंग, वचन, काल और कारक संबंध स्पष्ट करना।
काव्यात्मक भाषा सौंदर्य बढ़ाने वाले तत्वों का अध्ययन; शब्दालंकार (अनुप्रास, यमक, श्लेष) और अर्थालंकार (उपमा, रूपक, उत्प्रेक्षा, अतिशयोक्ति, मानवीकरण) के व्यावहारिक लक्षण।
व्यावहारिक, सामाजिक, अथवा राष्ट्रीय महत्व के विषयों पर दिए गए संकेत बिंदुओं (Hints) के आधार पर तार्किक रूप से लगभग 120 शब्दों में सुगठित अनुच्छेद लेखन।
व्यवसायिक, कार्यालयी, शिकायती पत्र प्रारूप (औपचारिक); तथा सगे-संबंधियों व मित्रों को लिखे जाने वाले आमंत्रण, सांत्वना व शुभकामना पत्र (अनौपचारिक) का मानक प्रारूप।
किसी रोज़गार या पद हेतु एक संक्षिप्त और सुगठित स्ववृत्त (Resume/CV) निर्माण; अथवा आधुनिक सूचना तकनीक के अनुरूप डिजिटल औपचारिक ईमेल लेखन का अभ्यास।
किसी उत्पाद या सेवा के प्रचार-प्रसार हेतु आकर्षक, कलात्मक और संक्षिप्त विज्ञापन (Advertisement) तैयार करना; अथवा विभिन्न पर्वों/अवसरों पर भेजे जाने वाले शुभकामना संदेश लेखन।

Mathematics.description: Sets and representations, empty, finite, infinite, and equal sets; subsets of real intervals, Venn diagrams, union, intersection, and complements.
Ordered pairs, Cartesian product of sets, domain, co-domain, and range of relations; real-valued functions (modulus, signum, logarithmic) and their graphs.
Radian/degree conversions, unit circle functions, identity proofs, signs of functions, domain/range graphs, and compounding angle identities ($\sin 2x, \cos 3x$).
Need for complex elements ($\sqrt{-1}$), algebraic properties of complex numbers, Argand plane mapping, and solving quadratic equations with complex roots.
Algebraic solutions of linear inequalities in one variable and graphical representations on the number line framework.
Fundamental principle of counting, factorial notations ($n!$), derivation and applications of permutations ($^nP_r$) and combinations ($^nC_r$).
Historical context, statement and proof of the binomial theorem for positive integral indices, Pascal's triangle, and expansion layouts.
Arithmetic Progression (Mean updates), Geometric Progression (G.P.), general terms, sum of $n$ terms of a G.P., infinite G.P. sums, and A.M.-G.M. relationships.
Slope of a line, angle between two lines, point-slope form, slope-intercept form, two-point intercept allocations, and computing distance from a point to a line.
Sections of a cone: circles, ellipses, parabolas, and hyperbolas; derivation of standard equations and analyzing their geometric properties.
Coordinate axes and coordinate planes across 3D space, coordinates of localized points, and the 3D distance evaluation formula.
Intuitive idea of limits, limits of polynomials, rational, and trigonometric expressions; first principle definitions of derivatives, and product/quotient rules.
Measures of dispersion: calculating range, mean deviation, variance, and standard deviation of ungrouped and grouped frequency data metrics.
Random experiments, outcomes, event subsets, exhaustive/mutually exclusive events, and axiomatic set-theoretic probability rules.

Physics.description: International SI metrics, fundamental and derived units, significant figures, dimensional formulas, and applications of dimensional analysis.
Frame of reference, uniform vs non-uniform motion, instantaneous velocity, kinematic graphs, and deriving equations for uniformly accelerated motion.
Scalar and vector properties, unit vectors, resolution of vectors, dot and cross products; projectile motion kinematics, and uniform circular motion.
Inertia frameworks, Newton's three laws of motion, momentum, impulse, conservation of linear momentum, equilibrium, static/kinetic friction, and banked road curves.
Work computations by constant/variable forces, kinetic energy, Work-Energy theorem, potential energy of springs, conservative forces, and vertical circular motion.
Center of mass equations, torque, angular momentum, conservation of angular momentum, equilibrium of rigid bodies, and moments of inertia configurations.
Kepler's planetary laws, Newton's universal law of gravitation, variation of '$g$' with altitude/depth, escape speed thresholds, and satellite orbital velocity.
Elastic behavior of matter, stress-strain curves, Hooke's Law, Young's Modulus, Bulk Modulus, Shear Modulus of rigidity, and elastic potential energy.
Pascal's law applications, hydraulic lifts, viscosity thresholds, Stokes' law, terminal velocity, streamline vs turbulent flow patterns, and Bernoulli's equation.
Thermal expansion profiles, specific heat capacities, calorimetry parameters, latent heat values, heat transfer loops, and Stefan-Boltzmann rules.
Thermal equilibrium states, Zeroth law, First Law of thermodynamics (internal energy/enthalpy), isothermal vs adiabatic expansions, and Second Law parameters.
Equation of state of perfect gases, kinetic interpretation of temperature, RMS speed calculations, degrees of freedom, and law of equipartition of energy.
Periodic vs oscillatory motions, simple harmonic motion (S.H.M.) equations, phase indicators, spring loading variables, and kinetic/potential energy in S.H.M.
Longitudinal and transverse wave tracking, displacement relations for traveling waves, superposition principles, string reflection loops, and beat frequencies.

Chemistry.description: Importance of chemistry, laws of chemical combination, Dalton's atomic theory, atomic/molecular masses, mole concept, empirical formulas, and stoichiometry.
Subatomic particles, Bohr's atomic model limits, de Broglie's wave duality, Heisenberg's uncertainty principle, quantum numbers, orbital shapes, and electron filling rules.
Modern periodic law, development of the periodic table layout, and periodic trends in properties (atomic/ionic radii, ionization enthalpy, electron gain, electronegativity).
Ionic vs covalent bonds, bond parameters, Lewis representations, VSEPR molecular geometry theory, hybridization ($s, p, d$), Molecular Orbital theory, and hydrogen bonding.
Systems, surroundings, state functions, First Law ($U, H$), specific heat, Hess's law, enthalpy calculations, spontaneity indicators, entropy, and Gibbs free energy ($\Delta G$).
Dynamic physical/chemical equilibrium, law of mass action, Le Chatelier's principle; ionic equilibrium, pH scales, buffer calculations, and solubility product.
Classical and electron transfer models of oxidation/reduction, oxidation number calculations, and balancing redox reactions by ion-electron/oxidation state codes.
Purification methods, IUPAC nomenclature systems, inductive, electromeric, resonance, and hyperconjugation electronic effects; free radicals, and reaction mechanisms.
Classification, isomerism, alkane conformations, chemical properties (halogenation, ozonolysis, electrophilic additions for alkenes/alkynes, aromatic substitution).

Biology.description: Biodiversity tracking, taxonomy and systematics structures, taxonomic hierarchy levels, and binomial nomenclature regulations.
Five-kingdom classification parameters; tracking salient characteristics of Monera, Protista, Fungi, alongside virus, viroid, and lichen profiles.
Classification matrices of Algae, Bryophytes, Pteridophytes, Gymnosperms, and Angiosperms, detailing lifecycle alternation of generations.
Structuring non-chordate phyla level characteristics and chordate classifications up to class parameters without speciment display.
Structural mapping of root, stem, leaf, inflorescence, flower whorls, fruit types, and seed categories (Solanaceae family deep-dive).
Microscopic identification of tissue system distributions in dicotyledonous and monocotyledonous root, stem, and leaf networks.
Animal tissue distributions (epithelial, connective, muscular, neural); anatomy and functional loops of organ systems inside Frogs.
Prokaryotic vs eukaryotic cell envelopes, plasma systems, cell walls, endomembrane assemblies, mitochondria, plastids, and chromosome structures.
Chemical analysis of cellular proteins, carbohydrates, lipids, nucleic acids, and enzyme action kinematics/classification.
Sequencing steps of the cell cycle; structural phases and genetic significance of Mitosis and Meiosis cell divisions.
Photochemical vs biosynthetic tracks, cyclic/non-cyclic photophosphorylation, chemiosmotic steps, photorespiration, and $C_3/C_4$ pathways.
Cellular gas distributions: Glycolysis pathways, anaerobic fermentation setups, TCA cycle (Krebs), Electron Transport System (ETS), and ATP tallying.
Phases of growth, differentiation/dedifferentiation loops, and mapping plant growth regulators (auxins, gibberellins, cytokinins, ethylene, ABA).
Human respiratory tract mechanics, breathing regulation models, gas partial pressure exchanges, transport of $O_2/CO_2$, and asthma/emphysema defects.
Blood composition, clotting cascades, lymph properties, human heart anatomy, cardiac cycle, ECG segments, and coronary defects.
Human nephron structures, ultrafiltration mechanisms, reabsorption/secretion paths, counter-current multipliers, and dialysis protocols.
Muscle fiber structures, sliding filament contraction mechanisms, human skeletal system map, types of joints, and gout/tetany disorders.
Neuron structure, nerve impulse propagation mechanisms, central nervous system (CNS) layout, reflex actions, and sensory setups.
Endocrine glands, tracking hormone target sites, hypo/hyper-secretions, and mechanism charts of hormone actions (peptide/steroid pathways).

Accountancy.description: Introduction to accounting, basic terminologies, GAAP, accounting principles, assumptions, accounting standards, and GST basics.
Recording transactions (Journal, Cashbook, Ledger), Bank Reconciliation Statements (BRS), Trial Balances, Depreciation calculations, and Rectification of Errors.
Constructing Trading, Profit and Loss Accounts, Balance Sheets with adjustments, and accounts from Incomplete Records (Statement of Affairs).

Business Studies.description: History of trade in India, nature and purpose of business, risk factors, and basic economic activities.
Sole Proprietorship, Joint Hindu Family, Partnership models, Cooperative societies, and Joint Stock Company formation pipelines.
Departmental undertakings, Statutory Corporations, Government companies, and tracking Multinational Corporations (MNCs).
Banking utilities (types of accounts/remittances), Insurance principles (Life, Fire, Marine), and warehousing logistical systems.
E-business operational frameworks, scope, safety checks, and online outsourcing methods (BPO/KPO systems).
Business ethics metrics, pollution control tracking, and responsibilities towards consumers, employees, and investors.
Retained earnings, equity shares, preference distributions, debentures, loans, and international finance avenues (ADR, GDR).
MSME classifications, role of small setups in rural economies, government assistance programs, and startup development.
Wholesale vs retail distribution lines, large-scale retail methods (Departmental stores, Mail order), and GST compliance.
Export/Import documentation steps (Bill of Lading, Letter of Credit), WTO functionalities, and international trade bodies.

Economics.description: Meaning, scope, functions, and high-weightage importance of statistics within macroeconomic planning architectures.
Sampling vs Census tools, questionnaire patterns, tabular sorting, and plotting geometric/frequency graphs.
Computing Arithmetic Mean, Median, and Mode; Karl Pearson's correlation metrics, and Index Numbers (inflation/wholesale tracking).
Micro vs Macro boundaries, positive vs normative scopes, central problems of economies, and Production Possibility Frontier (PPF) trends.
Utility analysis, Indifference Curve laws, price lines, demand schedules, and calculating Price Elasticity of Demand.
Production function laws (Short-run returns), explicit/implicit costs, total/marginal revenues, and supply elasticity curves.
Perfect competition traits, price determination under equilibrium, and impacts of Price Ceilings and Price Floors.

History.description: Changing traditions between the 9th-16th centuries; exploring Western European feudal systems, the Nobility, Clergy, and Peasantry.
European Renaissance timelines; evaluating breakthroughs in fine arts, humanism shifts, printing presses, and the Reformation.
European settlements in America and Australia; tracking frontier history lines and the displacement of native populations.
Comparing East Asian development styles; tracing Japan's rapid industrialization and China's transformation pathways.

Geography.description: Geography as an integrating, empirical, and spatial discipline; checking branches of physical and human geography.
Origin and evolution theories of the Earth; internal crust/mantle structural properties, earthquakes, volcanoes, and continental drift.
Rocks classification (igneous, sedimentary, metamorphic), weathering agents, geomorphic processes, and erosion landscapes.
Composition and layers of the atmosphere, insulation metrics, global wind belts, cyclonic storms, and planetary heat budgets.
Hydrological cycles, ocean floor configurations, temperature/salinity profiles, ocean waves, tides, and marine current loops.
Size, location vectors, geological divisions, monsoonal drainage systems, tropical vegetation zones, and natural hazard fields.

English.description: Reading comprehension, tone parsing, and vocabulary tracking for pieces like The Portrait of a Lady, Discovering Tut, and Silk Road.
Analyzing rhyme, poetic syntax, and imagery inside A Photograph, The Laburnum Top, The Voice of the Rain, Childhood, and Father to Son.
Character sketch evaluations and interpretation of supplementary works like The Summer of the Beautiful White Horse and The Address.
Formatting summaries, structured Note-making, compiling public posters, advertisements, speech outlines, and debate texts.
Tense corrections, relative clauses, active-passive structural rearrangements, and reordering jumbled phrase syntax.

Hindi.description: मुंशी प्रेमचंद, कृष्णा सोबती व अन्य दिग्गजों की गद्य रचनाएँ; कबीर, मीरा के पदों का साहित्यिक भावार्थ और भाषा शैली का सघन अभ्यास।
भारतीय गायिकाओं में बेजोड़: लता मंगेशकर, राजस्थान की रजत बूँदें व अन्य सांस्कृतिक रचनाओं का संस्मरण व व्याख्या अभ्यास।
जनसंचार माध्यमों की कार्यप्रणाली, पत्रकारीय लेखन के रूप, डायरी लिखने की कला, कथा-पटकथा संरचना और कार्यालयी लेखन।

Mathematics.description: Types of relations: reflexive, symmetric, transitive, and equivalence relations; one-to-one and onto functions.
Definition, range, domain, principal value branch, and basic graphs of inverse trigonometric functions.
Concept, notation, order, equality, types of matrices, operations (addition, scalar multiplication, matrix multiplication), non-commutativity, and transpose of matrices.
Determinant of a square matrix (up to $3 \times 3$), minors, cofactors, applications in area of triangles, adjoint/inverse of a matrix, and solving linear systems using matrix inversion.
Continuity and differentiability, derivative of composite functions, chain rule, implicit functions, inverse trig derivatives, exponential/logarithmic functions, and second-order derivatives.
Applications of derivatives: rate of change of bodies, increasing/decreasing functions, maxima and minima (first and second derivative tests with real problems).
Integration as inverse of differentiation; integration by substitution, partial fractions, and parts; evaluating fundamental definite integrals $\int_{a}^{b} f(x) dx$.
Applications in finding the area under simple curves, especially lines, circles, parabolas, and ellipses (in standard forms).
Definition, order, and degree; general and particular solutions; solving homogeneous and linear differential equations of the form: $\frac{dy}{dx} + P y = Q$.
Vectors and scalars, magnitude and direction, direction cosines/ratios, types of vectors, position vectors, scalar (dot) product, and vector (cross) product.
Direction cosines and direction ratios of a line joining two points; Cartesian and vector equations of a line, coplanar lines, and shortest distance between two lines.
Introduction, mathematical formulation of L.P. problems, graphical solution method for problems in two variables, feasible/infeasible regions, and optimal feasible solutions.
Conditional probability, multiplication theorem on probability, independent events, Total Probability theorem, Bayes' Theorem, and Random variable probability distributions.

Physics.description: Electric charge, conservation, Coulomb's law, electric field, field lines, electric dipole, electric flux, Gauss's Law statement, and applications to infinitely long straight wires and uniformly charged thin spherical shells.
Electric potential, potential difference, potential due to a point charge/dipole, equipotential surfaces, conductors, dielectrics, capacitors, and capacitance of parallel plate units.
Electric current, drift velocity, Ohm's law, electrical resistance, $V-I$ characteristics, temperature dependence, internal resistance of cells, Kirchhoff's laws, and Wheatstone bridge mechanics.
Biot-Savart law applications, Ampere's law loops, force on moving charges in magnetic fields, straight current wires, cyclotron limits, torque on current loops, and moving coil galvanometers.
Current loops as magnetic dipoles, magnetic dipole moments, bar magnets, magnetic field lines, Earth's magnetic elements, and properties of dia-, para-, and ferromagnetic substances.
Faraday's laws of induction, induced EMF and current, Lenz's Law, eddy currents, self-induction, and mutual induction parameters.
Peak and RMS values of alternating current/voltage; reactance, impedance, LCR series circuits, resonance, power in AC circuits, wattless current, AC generators, and transformers.
Displacement current basis, electromagnetic wave characteristics, transverse nature, and the electromagnetic spectrum (radio waves to gamma rays) with utility ranges.
Refraction at spherical surfaces, lenses, thin lens formula, lens maker's formula, magnification, power, refraction through prisms, scattering, optical microscope, and astronomical telescopes.
Wavefront configurations, Huygens' principle, refraction/reflection of plane waves, light wave interference, Young's double slit experiment, expression for fringe width, and diffraction layouts.
Photoelectric effect, Hertz and Lenard's observations, Einstein's photoelectric equation, particle nature of light, matter waves, and the de Broglie relation.
Alpha-particle scattering experiment, Rutherford's nuclear model of atom, Bohr model of hydrogen atom, energy levels, and hydrogen line spectra transitions.
Composition and size of nucleus, nuclear mass, mass defect, binding energy per nucleon variations, nuclear fission, and nuclear fusion processes.

Energy bands in solids, intrinsic vs extrinsic semiconductors ($p$-type, $n$-type), $p-n$ junction behaviors, forward/reverse bias, $p-n$ junction diode as rectifiers, and logic gates ($OR, AND, NOT, NAND, NOR$).

Chemistry.description: Types of solutions, expression of concentration of solutions, solubility of gases in liquids (Henry's law), Raoult's law, ideal/non-ideal solutions, and colligative properties (van 't Hoff factor).
Redox reactions, conductance in electrolytic solutions, specific and molar conductivity, Kohlrausch's Law, electrolysis, galvanic cells, Nernst equation, and fuel cells.

Rate of a reaction (average and instantaneous), factors affecting rates, order and molecularity of a reaction, rate law, integrated rate equations for zero/first-order reactions, and collision theory.

General introduction, electronic configuration, occurrence and characteristics of transition metals, oxidation states, ionic radii, color, catalytic properties, magnetic properties, and lanthanoids/actinoids.
Introduction, ligands, coordination number, color, magnetic properties, IUPAC nomenclature, isomerism, Werner's theory, Valence Bond Theory (VBT), and Crystal Field Theory (CFT).
Nomenclature, nature of $C-X$ bond, physical and chemical properties, mechanism of substitution reactions ($S_N1$ and $S_N2$), polyhalogen compounds, and environmental impacts.
Nomenclature, methods of preparation, physical and chemical properties, mechanism of dehydration of alcohols, electrophilic substitution in phenols, and uses.
Nomenclature, nature of carbonyl group, methods of preparation, physical and chemical properties, mechanism of nucleophilic addition, and acidity of carboxylic acids.
Nomenclature, classification, structure, methods of preparation, physical and chemical properties, basic strength of amines, and synthetic uses of diazonium salts.
Carbohydrates (classification, monosaccharides, glucose, fructose), Proteins (amino acids, peptide bonds, primary/secondary structures), Nucleic acids ($DNA/RNA$), and Vitamins.

Biology.description: Flower structure, development of male and female gametophytes, pollination types, double fertilization, seed development, fruit formation, apomixis, and polyembryony.
Male and female reproductive systems, microscopic anatomy of testis/ovary, gametogenesis (spermatogenesis & oogenesis), menstrual cycle, fertilization, blastocyst formation, pregnancy, and lactation.

Need for reproductive health and prevention of STDs; birth control methods, contraception, medical termination of pregnancy (MTP), amniocentesis, and infertility assisted technologies ($IVF, ZIFT, GIFT$).

Mendelian inheritance, deviations from Mendelism (incomplete dominance, co-dominance, multiple alleles), polygenic inheritance, chromosome theory, sex determination, and Mendelian/chromosomal disorders.

Search for genetic material, structure of $DNA$ and $RNA$, $DNA$ packaging, $DNA$ replication, transcription, genetic code, translation, gene expression regulation (Lac Operon), and $DNA$ fingerprinting.

Origin of life, biological evolution, evidences for evolution (paleontological, comparative anatomy, embryology), Darwin's contribution, Modern Synthetic theory, Hardy-Weinberg principle, and human evolution.
Pathogens and parasites causing human diseases (Malaria, Filariasis, Ascariasis, Typhoid, Pneumonia, Ringworm); immunology principles, vaccines, Cancer, HIV/AIDS, and drug/alcohol abuse.
Microbes in household food processing, industrial production, sewage treatment, energy generation (biogas), as biocontrol agents, and biofertilizers.
Genetic engineering technologies; recombinant $DNA$ technology steps, restriction enzymes, cloning vectors, PCR amplification, and downstream processing.
Applications in agriculture (Bt cotton, pest-resistant plants), medicine (genetically engineered insulin, gene therapy, molecular diagnosis), transgenic animals, and biosafety/biopiracy issues.
Organisms and environment: niche concepts, population attributes, population growth curves, and population interactions (mutualism, competition, predation, parasitism).
Ecosystem structure and function; productivity, decomposition, energy flow streams, ecological pyramids, ecological succession, and ecosystem services.
Concept and patterns of biodiversity, importance of biodiversity, loss of biodiversity, and conservation strategies (in-situ and ex-situ protections).

Accountancy.description: Partnership deeds, provisions of Indian Partnership Act 1932, Profit & Loss Appropriation accounts, partner capital accounts (fixed vs fluctuating), interest treatments, and goodwill valuation methods.
Accounting for changes in profit-sharing ratios, admission of a partner, retirement/death profiles, revaluation accounts, and complete dissolution settlement accounts.
Accounting for Share Capital (issue, allotment, over-subscription, forfeiture, re-issue of shares) and accounting for Debentures (issue, terms of redemption, collateral securities).

Financial statements of a company (Statement of Profit and Loss & Balance Sheet templates), tools for analysis, accounting ratios (liquidity, solvency, turnover, profitability), and Cash Flow Statements ($AS-3$).

Business Studies.description: Management as science, art, and profession; levels of management, management objectives, and core coordination functions.
Henri Fayol's 14 principles of management vs F.W. Taylor's scientific management rules, techniques, and functional foremanship.
Dimensions of business environment (Economic, Social, Technological, Political, Legal) and the impact of economic reforms.
Concept, importance, limitations, and planning process steps; types of plans (objectives, strategies, policies, procedures, budgets).
Concept, process, organizational structures (functional vs divisional), formal vs informal organizations, delegation elements, and decentralization.
Concept, staffing as a part of human resource management, recruitment sources, selection processes, training and development methods.
Elements of directing: supervision, motivation theories (Maslow's hierarchy), leadership styles (autocratic, democratic, laissez-faire), and communication barriers.
Concept, importance, relationship between planning and controlling, and steps in the management control process.
Role of financial management, investment, financing, and dividend decisions; financial planning, capital structure, and fixed/working capital variables.
Money market instruments (Treasury bills, Commercial paper) vs Capital markets (Primary and Secondary markets, NSE, BSE, and SEBI regulations).
Marketing philosophies, functions of marketing, and marketing mix elements ($4\text{Ps}$: Product, Price, Place, Promotion).
Importance of consumer protection, Consumer Protection Act 2019 legal rights, consumer responsibilities, and redressal machinery forums.

Economics.description: Circular flow of income, aggregates ($GDP, GNP, NDP, NNP$ at market price and factor cost), and methods of calculating national income (Product, Income, and Expenditure methods).
Money functions, commercial banking system credit creation processes, and functions of the Central Bank (RBI) using quantitative/qualitative controls.
Aggregate demand, aggregate supply, propensity to consume/save, short-run equilibrium output, investment multiplier mechanics, and corrections for excess/deficient demand.
Objectives, components of government budgets (classification of receipts and expenditure), and measures of government deficits (revenue, fiscal, primary).
Balance of Payments account meanings and components; foreign exchange market fixed vs flexible rate systems, and managed floating determination trends.
State of the Indian economy on the eve of independence, common goals of five-year plans, agricultural land reforms, green revolution, and industrial policies ($IPR\ 1956$).
Need for New Economic Policy; LPG features (Liberalization, Privatization, Globalization), and appraisals of WTO and economic reform impacts.
Human capital formation trends, rural development vectors, sustainable economic growth, employment patterns, and environmental threats.
Comparative metrics mapping India, Pakistan, and China across growth metrics, demographic curves, sectoral shifts, and human development rankings.

History.description: Themes 1 to 4: Harappan Urban Civilization (Bricks, Beads and Bones); Early Political/Economic Empires (Kings, Farmers and Towns); Social Histories (Kinship, Caste and Class); and Cultural Developments (Thinkers, Beliefs and Buildings).
Themes 5 to 8: Accounts of travelers (Al-Biruni, Ibn Battuta, François Bernier); Bhakti-Sufi transformations; Architecture of the Vijayanagara Empire; and Agrarian relationships under the Mughals.

Themes 9 to 11: Colonialism and the countryside (revenue settlements); the 1857 Revolt (Rebels and the Raj); Mahatma Gandhi and the Civil Disobedience Nationalist Movements; and Framing the Indian Constitution.

Geography.description: Human geography nature and scope; global population distribution, density, and growth trends; human development indexing; primary, secondary, tertiary, and quaternary economic activity frameworks; and global transport/trade corridors.

Population dynamics across states; migration types and consequences; human settlements classification; water resource management, mineral/energy deposits, planning strategies, and environmental pollution issues.

English.description: Advanced reading comprehension, thematic analysis, and author intent tracking for core pieces including The Last Lesson, Lost Spring, Deep Water, The Rattrap, Indigo, Poets and Pancakes, The Interview, and Going Places.
Technical analysis of poetic devices, metaphors, and rhyme parameters inside My Mother at Sixty-Six, Keeping Quiet, A Thing of Beauty, A Roadside Stand, and Aunt Jennifer's Tigers.

Character arcs, complex plots, and moral conflict tracking in pieces including The Third Level, The Tiger King, Journey to the End of the Earth, The Enemy, On the Face of It, and Memories of Childhood.
Strict professional layouts for drafting formal Short Notices, Invitations (Formal/Informal) and replies, Letters to Editors, Job Applications with resumes, Article writing, and Report compilation.
Integrated clause restructuring, active-to-passive transformation, direct-to-indirect narrative conversions, and syntax error detection frameworks within text blocks.

Hindi.description: हरिवंश राय बच्चन, तुलसीदास, सूर्यकांत त्रिपाठी निराला की कविताओं का आलोचनात्मक भावार्थ; महादेवी वर्मा (भक्तिन), जैनेंद्र कुमार (बाज़ार दर्शन) के गद्य खंडों की गहन व्याख्या व समीक्षा।
मनोहर श्याम जोशी की प्रसिद्ध रचना 'सिल्वर वैडिंग', आनंद यादव की 'जूझ', और 'अतीत में दबे पाँव' के माध्यम से संस्मरणात्मक गद्य, आंचलिक जीवन और ऐतिहासिक यात्रा वृतांतों का बोध।
जनसंचार माध्यमों की भाषा, समाचार लेखन का प्रारूप (उल्टा पिरामिड शैली), फीचर लेखन, स्तंभ लेखन, विशेष रिपोर्ट तैयार करना, कार्यालयी पत्र, और कार्यसूची (Agenda) निर्माण।
